description: 从 Reflector V3、Blend V2、Silo/Wise/Frax/Venus/Aave 类借贷审计报告抽出的 K2 专用审计 checklist，重点覆盖 Soroban 授权/TTL/oracle 与借贷协议账户、清算、状态迁移。
core_invariants: 每个 value-moving 或 config-mutating entrypoint 必须 require_auth 正确主体
价格查询必须使用完整、未过期、pair-specific 的 oracle 记录
repay/transfer/liquidate/migrate 后账户 solvency 配置必须从权威余额和 reserve 状态重算
所有普通路径、flash-loan 路径、defaulting/alternate liquidation 路径必须执行相同 pool/reserve status gate
hook/callback/external invocation 前后不能消费过期的检查结果
TTL/Vec/Map 维护不能因用户可控长度、零值或 partial update panic
trust_boundaries: token/aToken/debt-token transfer hook vs account data
common_bug_classes: bad debt and liquidation rounding edge case
check_items: 列出所有 pub fn：标记是否转移资产、改配置、改价格、改账户；逐个确认 require_auth 主体
对 oracle latest/last/twap/cross-price：构造 partial update，确认不会返回 None 或不完整价格给清算/借贷路径
对 aToken/debt token transfer：测试 repay 清零后转入相反债务，account data 是否重算
对 flash loan / alternate liquidation / defaulting path：确认 paused/frozen/inactive/status 与普通 borrow/withdraw/liquidate 一致
对 hook/callback：画出 check-effect-callback-final-transfer 顺序，回调后重新校验 health factor/reserve status
对 TTL/Vec：新增零值、重复资产、长度不一致、过期 ledger 后调用维护函数，确认不 panic/DoS
对低 decimal/1 wei collateral：检查 rounding up/down 是否能制造坏账或永久清算失败
test_ideas: Soroban unit test: complete price at t1, one-leg update at t2, x_last_price/latest used by lending must still find t1 pair-complete price
position sequence: deposit -> borrow -> repay -> debt-token transfer-in -> withdraw/borrow; assert health factor uses current reserve side
malicious callback/hook test: mutate collateral/debt/status between check and final transfer; expect revert or post-callback recheck
TTL regression: add asset with zero/default TTL fields then call extend_ttl; expect bounded success or explicit validation error, not panic
